top_signals.title: Asian Stocks Rebound on Iran Optimism, AI Trade: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: Asian stocks rebounded from their biggest drop since March as tensions in the Middle East eased and a selloff in artificial intelligence shares abated.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Silicon Valley’s new buyout playbook is hitting Wall Street
top_signals.summary: Instead of selling AI tools to companies, venture firms are buying legacy companies outright and rebuilding them around AI from the inside.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
